title: Subitem Duplication in the Same Group

posts.author: anazos (Andreas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello to all!

While searching for a long time I could find a solution to my problem so I wanted to ask if anyone else has a simiral issue and how they solved it.

I have a board with multiple groups. All the groups have an item which is the same everywhere (let’s name it “FULL”) and a lot of different items. What I want is when a new subitem is created in the item “FULL” to copy this new item to all the items in the same group.

In my mind I thought it would be much easier but I could make it even with Zapier.

If anyone can help please advise.

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: Which product and level do you have? ie work management, CRM etc?

posts.author: anazos (Andreas)
posts.cookedHtml: I have work management in standard plan.
